framework.name: Trust as Adoption Currency
framework.description: AI scaling depends less on technical sophistication than on establishing trust through governance structures. Even sophisticated algorithms fail when employees doubt data integrity or model reliability. Trust is built through clear ownership, codified standards, visible accountability, and measurable KPIs linking models to business outcomes.
framework.raw_quote: Trust is the currency of adoption. Even sophisticated algorithms falter when employees doubt the integrity of the data or the reliability of model outputs. Effective scaling therefore depends less on technical capability than on the establishment of governance structures that clarify ownership, codify standards, and make accountability visible.
